description: CompositionBlack round neck training t-shirt made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, with contrast panel with sublimated print, heat transfer swoosh logo and T90 lettering on the chest, mesh back panel, contrast tape at side seamFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners Do not bleach Cool iron Tumble dry on low Do not iron on design Do not dry clean Get ready to score goals with this lightweight nike T90 football training tee. This high-performance tee made of Dri-Fit fabric gives superior ventilation and comfort, helping you play longer. Team this up with tracks and nike cleats for superb action on the football field.
